comment: Rare map events tied to special spell domains. Each grants access to domain spells on success. These events are realm-agnostic and can appear on any map where the domain is thematically appropriate (controlled by map_config).

the_pit.title: The Pit
the_pit.text:
The path descends into a vast muddy hollow. Dozens of mudlings — squat, glistening figures of animated muck — mill about in the thick brown sludge below. They have a crude camp of sorts: stacked bones, offerings of rusted metal, a clumsily drawn circle of wet earth in the center.

One large mudling turns its featureless face toward you. A sound like bubbling tar rises from its throat. The others still.

choices.text: Attack. Clear the pit and take what they have.

on_victory.text: The last mudling splatters apart. In the muck at the hollow's centre you find a smooth obsidian tablet etched with flowing glyphs — a record of mud-working techniques older than memory.

on_defeat.text: The mudlings drag you out of the pit and leave you face-down on the road. They do not kill — only humiliate.

choices.text: Offer a valuable piece of equipment as tribute.

outcome.text:
The large mudling reaches out a dripping limb and takes the offering. It sinks it reverently into the central circle. The colony burbles with apparent satisfaction.

Then, slowly, the large one extends a clay-encrusted finger and draws something on your palm — a warm, tingling seal that fades into your skin.

choices.text: Demonstrate mastery of earth. Let them see what the deep stone knows.

outcome.text:
You call stone and soil to your hands and let the deep vibration speak. The mudlings go utterly still. Then, one by one, they prostrate themselves in the mud — a gesture that must mean something profound in mudling culture.

The elder rises and presses both palms against your chest. The knowledge of mud flows into you like a slow tide.

choices.text: Stage an impromptu mud puppet play for their entertainment.

outcome_success.text:
You scoop up handfuls of mud and begin. Heroes, villains, a tragic love, a pratfall — the mudlings watch in transfixed silence, then erupt into a sound like a dozen mud geysers firing at once. Applause.

The elder mudling, visibly moved, teaches you everything it knows.

outcome_failure.text: Your puppet stumbles. Your plot collapses. The mudlings watch politely for a moment, then begin pelting you with clods. You flee the pit covered head to toe — but oddly, not harmed.
